app.name: Faro
app.disclaimer: Faro is an educational analytics tool, not an investment adviser. Nothing here is investment advice.

common.comingSoon: Coming soon — this screen lands in a later milestone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: The dashboard, copilot, and reports all follow this language.
settings.providerHint: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env to use Claude; without a key, Faro uses a free local model via Ollama. No code changes either way.
settings.aboutText: Faro is an open-source, self-hosted portfolio-analytics app. It is educational only — it never executes trades, never links to a brokerage, and does not give personalized investment advice.
